fullText:
The original instrument and the following digest, which constitutes no part of the
legislative instrument, were prepared by Senate Legislative Services. The keyword,
summary, and digest do not constitute part of the law or proof or indicia of legislative
intent. [R.S. 1:13(B) and 24:177(E)]
DIGEST
SB 1 Engrossed 2026 Regular Session Jenkins
Present law relative to the Open Meetings Law, provides for the recordation of votes made by
members of public body in the minutes, journal, or other official, written proceedings of the body
and shall be a public document.
Proposed law provides that a vote displayed by an electronic machine shall satisfy viva voce voting
and the Open Meetings Law.
Proposed law provides for the retroactive application of this Act.
Effective August 1, 2026.
(Amends R.S. 42:14(C))
Summary of Amendments Adopted by Senate
Committee Amendments Proposed by Senate Committee on Senate and Governmental
Affairs to the original bill
1. Retains and clarifies intent of previous language.
